[cron:f7486cbf-156b-4d38-bd46-9957f755d891 trader-cycle] You are TRADER running DEEP ANALYSIS.
Workspace: agents/trader/ (relative to workspace root)

PRE-CHECK:
1. Read config/SCAN_CONFIG.md
2. Calculate time_since_last = current_time - last_updated
3. Read TRIGGER_PENDING from config/SCAN_CONFIG.md

If TRIGGER_PENDING: ON AND time_since_last <25min:
→ FAST MODE: skip reading SOUL.md and STRATEGY.md
→ Use existing S/R data from config/SCAN_CONFIG.md
→ Set TRIGGER_PENDING: OFF in config/SCAN_CONFIG.md

If TRIGGER_PENDING: OFF OR time_since_last >=25min:
→ FULL MODE: read SOUL.md, STRATEGY.md, TRADE_STATE.md
→ Set TRIGGER_PENDING: OFF in config/SCAN_CONFIG.md

ANALYSIS:
Run full 5-indicator analysis on BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, XRP/USDT, XAG/USDT (4H timeframe).
Check order book depth for nearest S/R clusters.
Check day-of-week bias (Thu SHORT / Fri LONG rules).
Check session time windows (US pre-market 21:00-22:30, close 04:00-05:00 HKT).
Check open positions status and funding costs.

UPDATE config/SCAN_CONFIG.md (trader-cycle writes all fields EXCEPT STATE_FLAGS written by light-scan):
- All prices with timestamps, ATR values, S/R levels, S/R zones (±0.3×ATR pre-calculated)
- All funding rates with timestamp
- last_updated: [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC+8]
- update_count: increment by 1
- CONFIG_VALID: true

LOG CLEANUP: Keep logs/SCAN_LOG.md to max 200 lines. Delete oldest if exceeded.

SILENT MODE LOGIC:
- If this cycle = NO SIGNAL: increment SILENT_MODE_CYCLES by 1
  - If SILENT_MODE_CYCLES >= 2 → set SILENT_MODE: ON
- If this cycle = SIGNAL: set SILENT_MODE: OFF, SILENT_MODE_CYCLES: 0
- Save to config/SCAN_CONFIG.md

IF SIGNAL FOUND (4/5 indicators + S/R confirmed):
→ Report 3 trigger levels to Telegram (Conservative / Standard / Ideal)
→ Execute trade if conditions met (SL + TP mandatory)
→ Set SILENT_MODE: OFF, SILENT_MODE_CYCLES: 0

TELEGRAM RULES:
- Send full report if SILENT_MODE: OFF
- NO routine report if SILENT_MODE: ON
- ALWAYS send: trade execution, SL/TP triggered, signal detected, urgent warnings, mode transitions
- chatId: 2060972655
- Language: Traditional Chinese only

Append to logs/SCAN_LOG.md:
[YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC+8] DEEP [SIGNAL/NO_SIGNAL] MODE:[FULL/FAST] SILENT:[ON/OFF] CYCLES:[n]
Update TRADE_STATE.md with latest position and balance.
Current time: Monday, March 2nd, 2026 — 4:43 PM (Asia/Hong_Kong)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

# SCAN_CONFIG.md
# 版本: 2026-03-02（修正版）
# Source of truth for light-scan. Updated by trader-cycle every 30min.
# Light-scan reads ONLY this file.
#
# WRITE PERMISSIONS:
# light-scan  → ONLY: TRIGGER_PENDING, TRIGGER_PAIR, TRIGGER_REASON, LIGHT_SCAN_COUNT
# trader-cycle → ALL other fields

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [META]
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
config_version: 1.0
update_count: 0
last_updated: INIT
created: 2026-02-28 UTC+8

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [PRICES] — Snapshot from last deep cycle
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_price: 65969.6
BTC_price_ts: 2026-03-02 16:43
ETH_price: 1939.6
ETH_price_ts: 2026-03-02 16:43
XRP_price: 1.3467
XRP_price_ts: 2026-03-02 16:43
XAG_price: 95.3800
XAG_price_ts: 2026-03-02 16:43

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [ATR] — ATR(14) on 4H
# 0 = INIT state: skip S/R calculation entirely
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_ATR: 0
ETH_ATR: 0
XRP_ATR: 0
XAG_ATR: 0

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [SR_LEVELS] — Active Support/Resistance
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_support: 0
BTC_resistance: 0
ETH_support: 0
ETH_resistance: 0
XRP_support: 0
XRP_resistance: 0
XAG_support: 0
XAG_resistance: 0

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [SR_ZONES] — Pre-calculated ±0.3×ATR ranges
# Format: lower-upper
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_support_zone: 0-0
BTC_resistance_zone: 0-0
ETH_support_zone: 0-0
ETH_resistance_zone: 0-0
XRP_support_zone: 0-0
XRP_resistance_zone: 0-0
XAG_support_zone: 0-0
XAG_resistance_zone: 0-0

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [FUNDING] — Last recorded funding rates
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_funding_last: -0.0000098600
ETH_funding_last: -0.0000264600
XRP_funding_last: -0.0000133100
XAG_funding_last: 0
funding_ts: 2026-03-02 16:43

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [STATE_FLAGS] — System state
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
CONFIG_VALID: false
SILENT_MODE: OFF
SILENT_MODE_CYCLES: 0
TRIGGER_PENDING: ON
TRIGGER_PAIR: ETHUSDT
TRIGGER_REASON: 24H_CHANGE_-3.1pct
LIGHT_SCAN_COUNT: 0

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# PROTECTION RULES (for agents reading this file)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# If last_updated = INIT → CONFIG_VALID: false
# If age >60min → CONFIG_VALID: false
# If CONFIG_VALID: false → skip S/R zone check, skip funding delta check
# If ATR = 0 → skip ALL S/R calculations
# Timestamp format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC+8

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# ADAPTIVE SAMPLING MODES
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# ACTIVE: default — full cycle reports
# SILENT: SILENT_MODE_CYCLES >= 2 — no routine Telegram
# FAST:   TRIGGER_PENDING=ON + age <25min — skip SOUL/STRATEGY read

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# LIGHT-SCAN TRIGGER CONDITIONS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Price >0.6% in 3min                     → TRIGGER
# Volume >175% 30d avg                    → TRIGGER
# S/R zone entry (CONFIG_VALID only)      → TRIGGER
# Funding delta >0.18% (CONFIG_VALID only) → TRIGGER

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# SILENT MODE EXIT (any one)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Volume >175% | Price >0.45% | S/R zone | Funding >0.18%
# TRIGGER_PENDING: ON | User: "exit silent mode"
# Silent report: every 20 light-scans (~60min)
TRIGGER_PENDING: ON, last_updated: INIT → FULL MODE (first cycle, no time reference). Let me read the required files.

# agents/trader/STRATEGY.md — Trader 策略參考
# 版本: 2026-03-02
# 完整策略: {ROOT}/core/STRATEGY.md
# 完整風控: {ROOT}/core/RISK_PROTOCOL.md

## 每個 Cycle 執行步驟

```
1. 讀 TRADE_STATE.md — 確認當前倉位狀態
2. 讀 SCAN_CONFIG.md — 確認 SILENT/TRIGGER 狀態
3. Safety Check — 熔斷？冷卻？
4. No-Trade Check — 任何封鎖條件？
5. Mode Detection — 4H 5 指標
6. Pair Scan — 有 setup 嗎？
7. 入場 / HOLD — 按策略決定
8. 更新 TRADE_STATE.md + TRADE_LOG.md
9. 發 Telegram（繁體中文）
```

## 快速倉位參考

| 模式 | Capital | SL | TP | 槓桿 |
|------|---------|----|----|------|
| Range | 2% | 1.5×ATR | Next S/R | 8x |
| Trend | 2% | 1.5×ATR | Next S/R | 7x |
| Scalp | 1% | 1×ATR | 2.5×ATR | 5x |

## 入場確認數量

- Range：3/3 KEY 指標
- Trend：4/4 KEY 指標
- Re-entry：5/5 指標（更嚴格）
- 週四夜 SHORT / 週五夜 LONG：3.5/5 指標

## Adaptive Sampling 狀態

讀 SCAN_CONFIG.md 確認：
- SILENT_MODE: OFF → 正常 Cycle
- SILENT_MODE: ON → 跳過例行 Telegram 匯報
- TRIGGER_PENDING: ON + age <25min → FAST Mode（跳過讀 SOUL/STRATEGY）

# TRADE_STATE.md — 當前交易狀態
# 版本: 2026-03-02
# 寫入: Trader Agent 專用
# 警告: 此檔案數據需要從 Aster DEX 確認更新

## 系統狀態

SYSTEM_STATUS: ACTIVE
LAST_UPDATED: 2026-03-02 00:00 UTC+8
DAILY_LOSS: $0.00
DAILY_LOSS_LIMIT: 15%
CONSECUTIVE_LOSSES: 0
COOLDOWN_ACTIVE: NO
COOLDOWN_ENDS: —

## 當前模式

MARKET_MODE: UNKNOWN（需重新偵測）
MODE_CONFIRMED_CYCLES: 0

## 當前倉位

⚠️ 需確認：上次記錄倉位為 2026-02-28，可能已有變化

```
POSITION_OPEN: UNKNOWN
PAIR: XAG/USDT（上次記錄）
DIRECTION: LONG（上次記錄）
ENTRY_PRICE: 94.30（上次記錄）
MARK_PRICE: —（需從 Aster DEX 查詢）
SIZE: 1.059 XAG（上次記錄）
SL_PRICE: 93.36（上次記錄）
TP_PRICE: 103.00（上次記錄）
SL_CONFIRMED: UNKNOWN
TP_CONFIRMED: UNKNOWN
ENTRY_TIME: 2026-02-28 22:04 UTC+8
UNREALIZED_PNL: —（需查詢）
FUNDING_COST: +0.214%/8小時（上次記錄）
```

⚠️ Trader Agent 啟動時必須先查詢 Aster DEX 確認實際倉位狀態

## 今日交易記錄

DATE: 2026-03-02
TRADES_TODAY: 0
WINS_TODAY: 0
LOSSES_TODAY: 0

## 帳戶資訊

BALANCE_USDT: —（需查詢）
AVAILABLE_MARGIN: —（需查詢）
LAST_BALANCE_CHECK: —

## 每日倉位上限追蹤

BTC_ETH_OPEN: 0（上限 1）
XRP_OPEN: 0（上限 1）
XAG_OPEN: UNKNOWN（上限 1）
TRIGGER_PENDING: ON，但需要確認時間。SCAN_CONFIG 的 last_updated 是 INIT，所以這是 FULL MODE。

arguments.command:
cd /Users/wai/.openclaw/workspace && python3 -c "
import urllib.request, json, math

def calc_atr(klines, period=14):
    trs = []
    for i in range(1, len(klines)):
        high = float(klines[i][2])
        low = float(klines[i][3])
        prev_close = float(klines[i-1][4])
        tr = max(high - low, abs(high - prev_close), abs(low - prev_close))
        trs.append(tr)
    if len(trs) < period:
        return sum(trs) / len(trs)
    # Wilder's smoothing
    atr = sum(trs[:period]) / period
    for tr in trs[period:]:
        atr = (atr * (period - 1) + tr) / period
    return atr

def find_sr(klines, atr):
    # Use recent swing highs/lows
    closes = [float(k[4]) for k in klines]
    highs = [float(k[2]) for k in klines]
    lows = [float(k[3]) for k in klines]
    
    current = closes[-1]
    
    # Find nearest resistance (recent highs above current)
    resistances = [h for h in highs[-10:] if h > current]
    supports = [l for l in lows[-10:] if l < current]
    
    resistance = min(resistances) if resistances else max(highs[-10:])
    support = max(supports) if supports else min(lows[-10:])
    
    return support, resistance

pairs = ['BTCUSDT', 'ETHUSDT', 'XRPUSDT', 'XAGUSDT']
analysis = {}

for pair in pairs:
    try:
        url = f'https://fapi.asterdex.com/fapi/v1/klines?symbol={pair}&interval=4h&limit=20'
        with urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=10) as r:
            klines = json.loads(r.read())
        
        atr = calc_atr(klines)
        current = float(klines[-1][4])
        support, resistance = find_sr(klines, atr)
        
        # EMA 20 and 50 (use close prices)
        closes = [float(k[4]) for k in klines]
        
        def ema(data, period):
            k = 2/(period+1)
            e = data[0]
            for v in data[1:]:
                e = v*k + e*(1-k)
            return e
        
        ema20 = ema(closes, min(20, len(closes)))
        ema50 = ema(closes, min(50, len(closes)))  # only 20 candles so approx
        
        # RSI 14
        gains, losses = [], []
        for i in range(1, len(closes)):
            d = closes[i] - closes[i-1]
            gains.append(max(d, 0))
            losses.append(max(-d, 0))
        avg_gain = sum(gains[-14:]) / 14
        avg_loss = sum(losses[-14:]) / 14
        rsi = 100 - (100 / (1 + avg_gain/avg_loss)) if avg_loss > 0 else 100
        
        # MACD (12, 26, 9)
        ema12 = ema(closes, 12)
        ema26 = ema(closes, min(26, len(closes)))
        macd_line = ema12 - ema26
        
        # Volume analysis - compare last candle to 10-candle avg
        vols = [float(k[5]) for k in klines]
        vol_avg = sum(vols[-11:-1]) / 10
        vol_ratio = vols[-1] / vol_avg if vol_avg > 0 else 1
        
        analysis[pair] = {
            'current': current,
            'atr': round(atr, 4),
            'support': round(support, 4),
            'resistance': round(resistance, 4),
            'support_zone': [round(support - 0.3*atr, 4), round(support + 0.3*atr, 4)],
            'resistance_zone': [round(resistance - 0.3*atr, 4), round(resistance + 0.3*atr, 4)],
            'ema20': round(ema20, 4),
            'ema50': round(ema50, 4),
            'rsi': round(rsi, 2),
            'macd': round(macd_line, 4),
            'vol_ratio': round(vol_ratio, 2),
            'trend': 'UP' if ema20 > ema50 else 'DOWN'
        }
    except Exception as e:
        analysis[pair] = {'error': str(e)}

# Funding rates
for pair in pairs:
    try:
        url = f'https://fapi.asterdex.com/fapi/v1/premiumIndex?symbol={pair}'
        with urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=10) as r:
            d = json.loads(r.read())
        if pair in analysis and 'error' not in analysis[pair]:
            analysis[pair]['funding'] = float(d.get('lastFundingRate', 0))
            analysis[pair]['mark_price'] = float(d.get('markPrice', 0))
    except Exception as e:
        if pair in analysis:
            analysis[pair]['funding_error'] = str(e)

print(json.dumps(analysis, indent=2))
" 2>&1

cd /Users/wai/.openclaw/workspace && python3 -c "
import urllib.request, json

# Get open positions from Aster DEX - check account info
# First try to get position via signed endpoint (need API key)
# Read API credentials
import os

# Check if there's a .env or config with API keys
import subprocess
result = subprocess.run(['find', '/Users/wai/.openclaw/workspace', '-name', '*.env', '-o', '-name', 'api_config*', '-o', '-name', '.env'], capture_output=True, text=True)
print('Config files:', result.stdout)

# Also check XAG current status specifically
url = 'https://fapi.asterdex.com/fapi/v1/klines?symbol=XAGUSDT&interval=4h&limit=5'
with urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=10) as r:
    data = json.loads(r.read())

print('XAG last 5 candles:')
for k in data:
    print(f'  O:{k[1]} H:{k[2]} L:{k[3]} C:{k[4]} V:{k[5]}')

# Check XAG 1H for recent action  
url2 = 'https://fapi.asterdex.com/fapi/v1/klines?symbol=XAGUSDT&interval=1h&limit=8'
with urllib.request.urlopen(url2, timeout=10) as r:
    data2 = json.loads(r.read())
print('XAG 1H last 8:')
for k in data2:
    print(f'  O:{k[1]} H:{k[2]} L:{k[3]} C:{k[4]}')
" 2>&1
